cit.basis: Flat 22% CIT under the Union Tax Law (2022 onwards, reduced from 25%), administered by the Internal Revenue Department (IRD).
cit.note: Companies listed on the Yangon Stock Exchange (YSX) are taxed at 17%. Oil and gas exploration/production is taxed at 25% per production-sharing terms — out of scope for this SME estimator.

commercial_tax.note: Myanmar has no VAT; a Commercial Tax of generally 5% (0-8% band depending on the goods/services) applies instead. Specific goods (tobacco, liquor, vehicles) additionally attract an excise-like Specific Goods Tax (SGT).

vat.note: Myanmar has not implemented VAT; the Commercial Tax regime applies instead.

wht.note: Withholding tax: interest paid to residents 0%/15% depending on payer/recipient status; royalties 10% (resident) / 15% (non-resident); 2.5% on payments to non-residents for goods and services.

fiscal_year.note: Myanmar's fiscal year runs October to September (FY2024-25 = 1 October 2024 to 30 September 2025).

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; Myanmar's October-September fiscal calendar and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector-specific rates (oil and gas per production-sharing terms), Commercial Tax band placement, SGT, WHT, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
